creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
this is done.

Please keep in mind that generally speaking, renaming a mailing list is a bad idea. because wee need to think about the public exposition of the archives (search engines etc) what do we do with them.

In general I am more in favor of creating a new mailing list from scratch and archiving the previous one (which technically means deleting it while keeping only the archives.)

Anyway In this case, I renamed it and added a redirection on the archives.

Note the mailing list itself accepted being reached at by any of the previous known email address.
